title: Stardew Valley Food
description: Cook and enjoy your favorite Stardew Valley meals in Minecraft.
body:
Stardew Valley Food

Turn your Minecraft kitchen into a little piece of Pelican Town.

 

**Stardew Valley Food** brings **81 memorable dishes from Stardew Valley** into Minecraft. Cook familiar favorites such as Pink Cake, Lucky Lunch, Survival Burger, Complete Breakfast, and Triple Shot Espresso, then take them along on your next mining trip, farming day, or adventure. Each food is a real survival item with its own recipe, nutrition, texture, and tooltip. Recipes use ingredients from Croptopia and Farmer's Delight, with the Farmer's Delight Cooking Pot used whenever it fits the dish. ---
## What's on the Menu? - **81 recognizable foods** inspired by Stardew Valley - Thoughtfully designed recipes with sensible ingredients and serving sizes - Soups, stews, desserts, seafood, drinks, and complete meals - Cooking Pot, crafting, and smoking recipes chosen to suit each dish - Flexible ingredient tags for compatibility with other farming mods - A dedicated creative tab containing every food - Full item names and tooltips in English, Thai, Japanese, Russian, and Simplified Chinese - Consistent content across Fabric, Forge, and NeoForge Whether you want a cozy kitchen, more reasons to grow crops, or a familiar meal before heading into the mines, the whole menu is ready to discover.
--- ## Required Mods - [**Croptopia**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia) - [**Farmer's Delight**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) - **Fabric API** for the Fabric version Dependency versions are kept flexible so compatible loader-specific releases can be used. --- ## Optional Compatibility - [**Croptopia Delight**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia-delight) - [**Pam's HarvestCraft 2 - Crops**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pams-harvestcraft-2-crops) on Forge and NeoForge When installed, supported crops from these mods can be used in recipes through compatibility tags. --- ## Installation 1. Install the appropriate Fabric, Forge, or NeoForge loader. 2. Install all required mods listed above. 3. Place Stardew Valley Food and its dependencies in the Minecraft `mods` folder. 4. Start the game and begin cooking. --- ## Version 0.4.0: The Final Feast Version **0.4.0** is the final major update to Stardew Valley Food. The entire mod was rebuilt and polished to deliver its most complete and consistent version across supported Minecraft releases. The mod will remain available after development ends. Thank you to everyone who downloaded it, cooked with it, translated it, reviewed it, or shared it over the years. What began as a small school project grew far beyond anything I expected, and I am truly grateful. --- ## Credits **Stardew Valley**, its characters, food designs, and original artwork were created by **ConcernedApe**. Stardew Valley Food is a free, fan-made Minecraft adaptation created by **TamKungZ_**. It is not affiliated with or endorsed by ConcernedApe.
